subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letters were perused, and the sighs and lamentations contained therein, arising from the lack [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکاتیب شما ملاحظه گردید و بر آه و فغان اطلاع حاصل شد از عدم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @poems and quotation from poetry, @growth of the Cause
